title: Stance & Step
description: A Vanilla-like Modpack that enhance your visuals and Animations.
body:
# Stance & Step
A lightweight Fabric-based modpack designed for Minecraft 1.21.4 that elevates your game's look and feel without altering the core gameplay. It enhances your experience through high-quality resource packs, shaders, and subtle visual mods — all while staying true to the vanilla aesthetic.

# 💠 Features:
## Smooth Animations
Improved player and mob animations using resource packs and client-side mods that bring more life to your world without overdoing it.

## Refined UI
Modern, minimalistic user interface packs that clean up menus, tooltips, and inventory screens for a more pleasant experience.

## Shader Support
Optional support for shaders with preconfigured, performance-friendly presets that add dynamic lighting, shadows, and better water — without losing the Minecraft charm. ( BSL & ComplementaryReimagined )

## Faithful Visual Packs
Resource packs that stay close to Minecraft’s original look while subtly enhancing textures, colors, and clarity.

## 🎮 Gameplay-Friendly:
This pack does not add new items, blocks, mobs, or mechanics. It’s all about visuals — perfect for builders, explorers, and survival players who want Minecraft to look its best while keeping the vanilla spirit untouched.
